name: The Quantum Conflict
short_description: Jump into action-packed space dogfights with up to 8 players (or AI's) locally or over Remote-Play-Together. Use outlandish sci-fi weapons, including the wormhole maker and time altering munitions while avoiding asteroids, wormholes, planet gravity, and other hazards in endless space exploration!
detailed_description:
In the vast expanse of the cosmos, a new age of interstellar conflict unfolds. Blast into the "The Quantum Conflict," an action-packed space combat game where strategy meets adrenaline-fueled battles. Choose an advanced spaceship, engage in intense dogfights and tactical maneuvers against cunning AI or in thrilling player versus player (PvP) dogfights. Choose a ship and utilize a vast array of weapons, including Chronos munitions that can manipulate time, accelerating, slowing, and even rewinding time itself. Navigate through asteroid fields, dive into the heart of wormholes, and outmaneuver your opponents in epic showdowns. With stunning graphics and immersive gameplay, only the most skilled pilots can dominate the stars. Embark on an endless voyage to survive the hazards of space and jump through bizarre dimensions. Prepare for liftoff, commander – the galaxy awaits you!



  • Multiplayer Mayhem: Enjoy local multiplayer with up to 8 players or connect remotely via Steam Remote Play for epic space battles.
  • Time-Bending Arsenal: Master an array of unique weapons that manipulate time – rewind, stop, slow, and speed up time to outwit your opponents.
  • Gravity-Defying Gameplay: Utilize gravity and time control mechanics to strategize and dominate in team modes and versus battles.
  • AI Opponents: Play solo or with other players against challenging AI opponents.
  • Single Player Modes: 90 Challenge stages on 3 difficulties or play randomized skirmish matches.
  • Endless Mode: Explore as far into the infinite randomly generated cosmos as possible before succumbing to the hostile environment and enemies. See how far you can make it to level up your ship and explore new dimensions!
  • Futuristic Setting: Dive into a distant future where factions vie for control over time itself, set against the backdrop of breathtaking space vistas.



    (for more than one local player, additional players require gamepads)

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Indonesian, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Spanish - Latin America, Swedish, Turkish
